title: Asparaguas Grilled Verde
description: A floral, creamy Brazilian dish featuring grilled asparagus that's both hangover-cure-friendly and pescatarian.
instructions: Wash and trim the asparagus spears.
In a bowl, combine olive oil, minced garlic, lime juice, salt, and white pepper. Mix well to create a marinade.
Place the asparagus in the marinade, ensuring all spears are coated evenly. Marinate for at least 30 minutes or up to several hours.
Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (about 400°F/205°C).
Grill the asparagus for about 6-8 minutes on each side, until tender and slightly charred. The internal temperature should reach at least 135°F (57°C) when tested with an instant-read thermometer.
Serve hot or at room temperature.
